S.FORM: Geoffrey Arend kawas tay 1978, ryax sa tay 28 nqu tay 2, Geoffrey Arend, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: ɣeo**rej aren* kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, ɣeo**rej aren*, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
